rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s core method is a multivariate time-varying state-space/dynamic linear system with evolving elasticities and Bayesian estimation, while the cited paper is explicitly a hierarchical Bayesian dynamic linear model for evolving market-response parameters under nonstationarity.
